title: Camera
primeReason: Point the camera and take a shot — all the controls are on the console.
profTagline: A pocket camera console, loaded with controls — filters, exposure, zoom, torch, timer, grid, mirror, front/back and a 1:1 / 4:3 / full frame — behind a single square viewfinder and a big shutter. Capture stays on your device; nothing is uploaded.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
